summary: Tested server.py modularization into PMS, Finance, and Reports routers. All 59 API endpoint tests pass (40 new + 19 existing). Fixed route conflict with night-audit endpoints that were shadowed by mock implementations in comprehensive_modules_endpoints.py.

fixed.issue: Route conflict - mock endpoints in comprehensive_modules_endpoints.py (with require_super_admin dependency) were shadowing real implementations in routers/reports.py
fixed.resolution: Removed mock night-audit endpoints from comprehensive_modules_endpoints.py, real endpoints in routers/reports.py now accessible

critical_code_review_comments: Router modularization successful - PMS, Finance, Reports routers properly extracted and all endpoints working
comprehensive_modules_endpoints.py had duplicate mock implementations that caused route conflicts - now fixed

All 18 endpoints specified in test request verified working: auth/login, pms/rooms, pms/dashboard, pms/bookings, pms/guests, folio/list, folio/dashboard-stats, accounting/dashboard, accounting/suppliers, accounting/expenses, cashiering/city-ledger, reports/daily-flash, reports/occupancy, reports/revenue, night-audit/status, housekeeping/rooms, departments/, auth/me
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_pms_finance_reports_routers.py - Created comprehensive test suite for extracted routers (40 tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server.py modularization complete. 3 new routers extracted: pms.py (rooms, bookings, guests, dashboard), finance.py (folio, accounting, invoices, cashiering), reports.py (reports, night-audit). All endpoint tests pass. Previous routers (auth, housekeeping, departments) also verified working. Night-audit route conflict fixed by removing mock endpoints from comprehensive_modules_endpoints.py.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: comprehensive_modules_endpoints.py (line 40-87) contained duplicate mock implementations of /night-audit/run, /night-audit/status, and /night-audit/history. These mock endpoints were included in the app with require_super_admin dependency (server.py line 40916), which caused non-super-admin users to receive 'Not found' errors. The real implementations in routers/reports.py were being shadowed. Solution: Removed the mock night-audit endpoints from comprehensive_modules_endpoints.py, allowing the real implementations to be properly routed.
